calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Respondent/Plaintiff Simin Marefat is present.
Appellant/Defendant Spade Landscape Services, Inc. is not present in Court this date.

The cause comes on regularly for a Trial de Novo. Ms. Simin Marefat is affirmed.

Due to the non appearance of Appellant/Defendant Spade Landscape Services, Inc., the Court orders that the Judgment awarded in this action is affirmed.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-03-2017 Continued To Sep-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Plaintiff/Respondent Simin Marefat present in pro per. No appearance was made by any Defendant/Appellant Ben Marks.

It was reported to the courtroom clerk by the appeals clerk that Mr. Marks telephoned to the Court on Wednesday, August 2, 2017, and left the message that he is presently in Tennessee visiting with his dying father, and will be unable to be present for the scheduled August 3 hearing, and that he was requesting a continuance of the hearing. The Court stated that he would be granting the request and continuing the hearing to his next scheduled hearing date of September 7, 2017. He added that no further continuances of the cause upon request of Defendant/Appellant Ben Marks would be granted. The matter was continued to September 7, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 525.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. (Not reported)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Judgment Entered
